_doc: sys_parameters.json — Protocol Adapter System Configuration. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for the full schema reference.

polling._comment: REPLACE: One entry per physical server/PLC/device endpoint. Add more entries for multi-server setups.

protocol._comment: REPLACE: Add protocol-specific connection fields inside this block. See examples below.

_examples._note: This '_examples' block is for documentation only — remove it before deploying.

polling._comment_connection_type: persist = long-lived connection; nonpersist = connect and disconnect for each poll cycle
polling._comment_poll_timeout: milliseconds before a read() call times out
polling._comment_interpoll_delay: optional milliseconds to sleep between polling rate groups within one server thread

command_server._comment: OPTIONAL: Enable this block only if your protocol supports write commands from a remote source.
command_server._comment2: When enabled, the post_handler opens an HTTP server (or MQTT subscriber) that accepts write payloads.

posting._comment: CHOOSE ONE posting type and remove the other two blocks. The first entry is used.
posting._comment2: In IoConnect production mode, this entire posting[] is IGNORED — the platform injects REDPANDA_KAFKA_ADDRESS via /etc/environment.
posting._comment3: For --no-ioconnect (standalone) mode, configure one of the three backends below.

posting._comment: Use this when running standalone with a local or remote Redpanda broker.
